qa_pairs.question: What services on the Cedar cluster were unavailable during the outage from November 7, 2024, to November 8, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: Cedar compute nodes were unavailable during this period.

qa_pairs.question: Which Cedar cluster services remained operational during the outage from November 7 to November 8, 2024?
qa_pairs.answer: Cedar login nodes, storage, and cloud services remained operational and unaffected.
